tinker.name: Hash
tinker.description: Hash calculator supporting MD5, SHA1, SHA256, and SHA512

zh-CN.name: 哈希计算
zh-CN.description: 哈希计算，支持 MD5、SHA1、SHA256 和 SHA512

hash.description: Calculate MD5, SHA1, SHA256, and SHA512 for text or a file. Provide exactly one of text or path. Updates the plugin UI and returns the hashes.

text.description: Text content to hash. Mutually exclusive with path.

path.description: Absolute path to a file to hash. Mutually exclusive with text.

uppercase.description: Return hashes in uppercase. Defaults to the current UI setting.
